ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "aircraft_characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the aircraft (e.g., AIRBUS_A320, BOEING_747_8F) */,
  "aircraft_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of aircraft */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the aircraft model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific aircraft model */,
  "empty_weight" INTEGER /* Empty weight of the aircraft in kilograms */,
  "fuel_capacity" INTEGER /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft in litres */,
  "passenger_capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "freight_capacity" INTEGER /* Freight capacity of the aircraft in kilograms */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number of the aircraft */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES aircraft_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_aircraft_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_type_id") REFERENCES aircraft_types ("aircraft_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_types" (
  "aircraft_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft type (e.g., AIRPLANE, HELICOPTER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the aircraft type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer (e.g., Airbus, Boeing) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "aircraft_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of aircraft */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., A320, 747-8F) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the aircraft model */,
  "max_altitude" INTEGER /* Maximum altitude the aircraft model can reach */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed the aircraft model can reach */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES aircraft_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_models_aircraft_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_type_id") REFERENCES aircraft_types ("aircraft_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_operational_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational data entry */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft model */,
  "flight_hours" REAL /* Total flight hours of the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_hours" REAL /* Total maintenance hours of the aircraft */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "total_flights" INTEGER /* Total number of flights made by the aircraft */,
  "cyclical_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the next cyclical maintenance */,
  "airworthiness_certificate_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the airworthiness certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_operational_data_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_fuel_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel consumption entry */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft model */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrival airport */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed during the flight in litres */,
  "flight_distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the flight in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_fuel_consumption_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_fuel_consumption_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_fuel_consumption_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_fuel_consumption_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number (e.g., AA123) */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique employee ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft model */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_maintenance_records_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code (e.g., LAX, JFK) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., pilot, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
